name: Curtain Down
description: Theater curtain descending as the show ends

simple: theater curtain descending with velvet whoosh and final applause
standard: theater curtain descending with velvet whoosh and final applause
jazz club spotlight dimming with warm fade
swing band hitting final accent with brass stab
detailed: theater curtain descending with velvet whoosh and final applause
jazz club spotlight dimming with warm fade
swing band hitting final accent with brass stab
audience murmur settling after standing ovation
house lights coming up with gentle warmth

instruments: wire brushes swirling on snare head
